zh.lifeSummary: 當David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai於1400年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，他的父親Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai27歲，母親Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x23歲。他於1422年與Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年2月2日在英國賀福爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai于1400年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，他的父亲Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai27岁，母亲Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x23岁。他于1422年与Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年2月2日在英国賀福爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griffieth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .
German: variant of   Greif   1.

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire):
habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).
possibly a variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffes
meanings: Welsh: altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffeth
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

variants.name: Griffth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffitt
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Welsh surname, originally a nickname meaning ‘grey(-haired)’, now also widely used outside Wales.  See also  Floyd .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai was born in 1400, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai, was 27 and his mother, Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, was 23. He married Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn in 1422, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 2 February 1461, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai est né en 1400, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn en 1422, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 2 février 1461, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai 1400 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai 27 und seine Mutter Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x 23. Er hat 1422 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1461 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai è nato il nel 1400 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn nel 1422, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1461, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llaiが1400年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Griffith Vychan of Llaiは27歳，母Lady Maud Griffith Vychan xは23歳であった。1422年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでLady Mary Damasen Mathavarnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年2月2日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai(이)가 1400년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 2월 2일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai nasceu em 1400, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn em 1422, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1461, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai родился в 1400 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn в 1422 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 2 февраля 1461 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai nació en 1400, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Lord Griffith Vychan of Llai, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Maud Griffith Vychan x, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn en 1422, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1461, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
